case_title: BRATTESANI, STEVEN vs. COASTLAND VENTURES, INC. A CALIF. CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRATTESANI, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT COASTLAND VENTURES, INC. A CALIF. CORP. SMITH, DENNIS MULLENS, CHRIS FERRARI, GARY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-25-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-25-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-28-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-28-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAY-28-1996 TO JUN-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
